title: Mysterious Girlfriend X
sourceNotes: Single season: 12 TV episodes (Hoods Entertainment, 2012) plus a 13th-episode OVA bundled with Volume 9 of the manga, matching AniList's 13-episode total. Manga complete at 101 chapters per AniList (frequently cited elsewhere as 92 chapters across 12 volumes; the discrepancy likely reflects raw serialized vs. tankobon-collected chapter counts). The anime adapts roughly the first third of the story, commonly cited as ending around chapter 36 of the 92-chapter count (~chapter 40 scaled to AniList's total) with the OVA functioning as a bundled side story rather than the immediate next chapter, so chapter ranges are approximate.
